name: Melody4U Weekly Image Agent
description: Automated weekly event overview and Melody4U image prompt/image generation agent.

folders.prompts: Prompt templates and Melody4U visual style rules.
folders.output: Generated prompt files, image manifests and optional images.
folders.github_workflows: Scheduled and manual GitHub Actions workflows.

GENERATE_IMAGES.description: If true, the agent generates paid images using the OpenAI Images API. If false, it only creates JSON and prompt files.

content_rules: No real athlete or celebrity likenesses
Use English text on generated images
